hooks.command: cd ios-app/PTPerformance && swiftlint lint --config .swiftlint.yml --quiet 2>/dev/null | head -5 || true

echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('file_path',''); blocked=['.env','secrets/','migrations/','clinical-rules/','audit_log/','certs/']; exit(1) if any(b in p for b in blocked) else exit(0)" || (echo 'BLOCKED: This path requires explicit human approval. Regulated path detected.' && exit 1)

echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); c=d.get('command',''); blocked=['curl|bash','curl|sh','wget|bash','wget|sh','rm -rf /','> /dev/sd']; exit(1) if any(b in c.replace(' ','') for b in [x.replace(' ','') for x in blocked]) else exit(0)" || (echo 'BLOCKED: Unsafe command pattern detected.' && exit 1)
